message:
🐛 fix: Add options/ directory to core.Dockerfile for build to succeed (#3619)

* refactor: use centralized spellcheck workflow and remove add-to-project

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 fix: Add options/ directory to core.Dockerfile for build to succeed

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ RUN go mod download
 COPY cmd/controller-manager/main.go cmd/controller-manager/main.go
 COPY api/ api/
 COPY pkg/ pkg/
+COPY options/ options/
 
 # Build
 # the GOARCH has not a default value to allow the binary be built according to the host where the command
